summary: The test suite thoroughly covers all core retention policies (max-age, keep-latest-N, max-total-size), combined policy ordering, dry-run mode, and a solid set of edge cases (empty list, no policies, all three negative-input throws, keepLatestN=0, sorted-output invariant). Exact numeric assertions (6_500_000, 8_500_000, etc.) against well-documented fixture data make regressions immediately obvious. The fixture file itself is a highlight — it pre-calculates artifact ages and totals in comments, making test reasoning transparent. Organization into nested describe blocks mirroring the policy application order is clean and readable, with no shared mutable state between tests. The main coverage gaps are: (1) `formatDeletionPlan` is never exercised — a formatting regression would be invisible; (2) `main.ts` CLI argument parsing is untested; (3) a handful of boundary conditions are missing — artifact exactly at the age cutoff (off-by-one risk), maxAgeDays=0 (delete all), maxTotalSizeBytes=0, and all artifacts belonging to one workflow. Rigor is good but not exhaustive on boundary arithmetic.
